CustomField.description: The system automatically updates the last escalation based on the most recent escalated period utilization. This field is solely for tracking purposes and does not influence any underlying logic. Any direct edits made by admins will be overridden by the system after the next escalated period utilization
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The system automatically updates the last escalation based on the most recent escalated period utilization. This field is solely for tracking purposes and does not influence any underlying logic. Any direct edits made by admins will be overridden by the system after the next escalated period utilization
CustomField.label: Last Escalation Date
